taskId: 20260703-104215-修复-ypi-studio-子代理卡死-停止无效与超大输出崩溃问题
message: 已完成设计产物，未实现生产代码。 Artifacts produced: - `.ypi/tasks/20260703-104215-修复-ypi-studio-子代理卡死-停止无效与超大输出崩溃问题/brief.md` - `prd.md` - `ui.md` - `design.md` - `implement.md` - `checks.md` - `handoff.md` 核心结论： - `ERR_STRING_TOO_LONG` 高度关联 `runChildPi()` 中 stdout/stderr 无界 Buffer 累积、`stdoutBuffer += chunk.toString()`、结束时 `Buffer.concat(...).toString()`。 - MVP 修复应改为流式 JSONL 解析 + bounded accumulator；最终文本从已解析 assistant `message_end` 提取，禁止全量 stdout/stderr 转字符串。 - stop 需要从 `AgentSessionWrapper.abort/destroy` 级联到 Studio child process；建议新增全局 child registry，并使用进程组 kill + grace 后强杀。 - 卡死检测建议：首事件 warning、idle timeout、max runtime timeout；主动 stop 为 `cancelled`，timeout/output-limit 为 `failed + warning`，不新增破坏性 status。 Validation: - 设计-only，未运行 lint/tsc。 Remaining risks: - Windows/POSIX 进程树 kill 行为需实现时重点验证。 - 输出/timeout 默认阈值可能需要根据真实长任务调整。 - abort 超时提前返回需避免 UI 与底层 agent 状态短暂不一致。 Decisions needed from main session: - 确认默认阈值：stdout 16MiB、stderr 1MiB、单行 1MiB、final output 256KiB、idle 10min、max runtime 60min、kill grac…

taskId: 20260703-104215-修复-ypi-studio-子代理卡死-停止无效与超大输出崩溃问题
message: ### Check Complete #### Files changed / artifacts produced - No code changes by checker. - Reviewed: - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` - `lib/ypi-studio-subagent-runtime.ts` - `lib/rpc-manager.ts` - `lib/ypi-studio-transcripts.ts` - `app/api/agent/[id]/route.ts` - `components/YpiStudioSubagentTranscript.tsx` - `components/YpiStudioSessionWidget.tsx` #### Blockers - `lib/rpc-manager.ts:104-107` + `app/api/agent/[id]/route.ts:17-21` `abort` now cascades to Studio child runs, but `AgentSessionWrapper.send("abort")` still `await this.inner.abort()` with no timeout. If Pi SDK abort hangs after child kill, `POST /api/agent/[id]` can still hang, so “stop/abort must be effective and route should not hang long” is not fully closed. #### Non-blockers - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` looks good on the main memory issue: - removed full stdout/stderr accumulation / `Buffer.concat(...).toString()` - stdout parsed as bounded JSONL - bounded final output / preview / tail / transcript / API projection - …

taskId: 20260703-104215-修复-ypi-studio-子代理卡死-停止无效与超大输出崩溃问题
message: ### Check Complete #### Findings Fixed - `lib/rpc-manager.ts`: `abort` now calls `abortYpiStudioChildRunsForSession()` before `inner.abort()`, and wraps `inner.abort()` in a 3s `Promise.race`, returning `{ abortedChildren, abortTimedOut }`. - `app/api/agent/[id]/route.ts`: `abort` no longer starts a new AgentSession when no live session exists; it directly aborts matching Studio child runs and returns `{ running: false, abortedChildren }`. #### Remaining Findings - None blocking for this reviewed blocker. - Known residual risk: if `inner.abort()` exceeds 3s, the HTTP request now returns promptly, but parent-session cleanup may still finish asynchronously. This matches the intended mitigation and is not a blocker. #### Validation Run - `npm run lint` — pass - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — pass - `npm run test:studio-policy` — pass #### Files Reviewed - `lib/rpc-manager.ts` - `app/api/agent/[id]/route.ts` - `lib/ypi-studio-subagent-runtime.ts` #### Artifacts Produced - None #### Ve…
